# Hind AI - Full Project & Scripture Library Documentation

> Comprehensive developer and AI agent guide to the Hind AI platform, cataloging the codebase architecture, supported features, scripture datasets, and user pathways.

## Overview
Hind AI is a Next.js 15+ and React 19 application hosting an interactive scripture catalog of Sanatana Dharma, powered by Gemini models and the Google Antigravity SDK. It is structured for clean, legibly-displayed study of ancient Indian scriptures, providing bilingual Sanskrit-transliteration-English reading interfaces, AI guides, Japa counters, and visual analysis tools.

---

## Content & Scripture Catalog Architecture

### 1. Library Shelf (`/contents`)
The catalog is split into Shruti and Smriti literature:
- **Rigveda, Yajurveda, Samaveda, Atharvaveda**: The four primary Vedas, structured into Samhitas, Brahmanas, Aranyakas, and Upanishads.
- **Upanishads**: 108 canonical Upanishads (Isa, Kena, Katha, Prasna, Mundaka, Mandukya, Taittiriya, Aitareya, Chandogya, Brihadaranyaka, Svetasvatara, etc.) covering non-dual Vedanta.
- **Itihasas**: Epics including Valmiki Ramayana and Vyasa Mahabharata (featuring the Bhagavad Gita).
- **Puranas**: 18 Mahapuranas (Vishnu, Bhagavata, Shiva, Devi Bhagavata, Markandeya, etc.).
- **Philosophies**: The Six Darshanas (Nyaya, Vaisheshika, Samkhya, Yoga, Mimamsa, Vedanta).

### 2. Daily Sadhana (`/sadhana`)
An interactive digital Japa Mala tool allowing users to:
- Select a mantra (e.g. Gayatri Mantra, Mahamrityunjaya Mantra, Om Namah Shivaya).
- Set Sankalpa (goals: 27, 54, 108 chants).
- Track sessions locally in `localStorage` without forced logins.
- View a progress dashboard, daily reminders, and Panchanga-calculated guidelines.

### 3. Guru AI Guide (`/ai-guide`)
A context-aware AI chat interface designed to answer philosophical and translation questions using the Google Gemma 4 API. It supports:
- Streaming-friendly text answers.
- Scriptural source citations.
- Language-specific guidance.

### 4. Sanskrit Studio (`/sanskrit-nova` & `/sanskrit-tools`)
A suite of tools for learners of the Sanskrit language:
- Transliteration convertors (Devanagari, IAST, Harvard-Kyoto, ITRANS).
- Dictionary lookup and base word analysis.
- Verse-by-verse parsing showing sandhi splits and compound analysis.

---

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 15.5+ (App Router)
- **UI & Styling**: Tailwind CSS, Radix UI primitives, Framer Motion for smooth micro-animations.
- **Theme**: Glassmorphism aesthetic featuring a saffron & gold accented palette (supporting seamless light/dark mode transitions).
- **State Management**: React Hooks (useState, useEffect, useMemo) combined with local storage persistence.

---

## Primary Page Paths & Links
- [Homepage](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/): Main entrance and overview.
- [Library Shelf](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/contents): Explore the core catalog.
- [Guru AI Guide](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/ai-guide): Dynamic chat query interface.
- [Vision Analysis](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/vision): Upload iconography or text pictures.
- [Dharma Guide](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/dharma): Guidelines on daily spiritual duties.
- [Daily Sadhana](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/sadhana): Japa Mala digital counter.
- [Sanskrit Studio](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/sanskrit-nova): Interactive language learning sandbox.
- [Sanskrit Tools](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/sanskrit-tools): Alphabet conversion and lexicon utilities.
- [Learning Hub](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/learning): Curated guides on Vedas and philosophy.
- [Panchanga](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/panchanga): Calendar calculation tool.
- [Philosophies](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/philosophies): Deep-dives into the six orthodox darshanas.
- [Stotras Library](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/stotras): Audio players and full lyrics for Hanuman Chalisa, Gayatri Mantra, and major Aartis.
- [Guided Study Paths](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/study-paths): Structured study roadmaps.
